summary: Completed testing of Admin Applications redesign features. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Applications list with search/filter, detail view with personal info/documents/payment, quick action buttons (reviewing/accepted/rejected/modify), modify modal with mandatory reason, messaging component. The 'À modifier' status badge appears in orange with warning icon.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/applications - returns list of applications
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=reviewing - updates to reviewing
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=accepted - updates to accepted
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=rejected - updates to rejected
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=modify&reason=... - updates to modify with reason
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=modify - works without reason
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=invalid - returns 400
Backend: Verify modify status and reason persisted in database
Backend: POST /api/admin/applications/{id}/message - sends message to candidate
Backend: GET /api/admin/applications/{id}/messages - retrieves messages
Backend: Multiple messages can be sent and retrieved
Backend: Message to non-existent application returns 404
Backend: Get messages for non-existent application returns 404
Backend: Status update requires admin authentication
Backend: Send message requires admin authentication
Backend: Get messages requires admin authentication
Backend: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/payment-status - all statuses work
Backend: Invalid payment status returns 400
Backend: Cleanup - reset status to pending
Frontend: Login as admin works
Frontend: Admin Panel navigation works
Frontend: Candidatures section shows list with search and status filters
Frontend: Status filter tabs show counts (En attente, En examen, Acceptées, Refusées, À modifier)
Frontend: Application cards show applicant name, program, email, status badge
Frontend: Clicking application opens detail view
Frontend: Detail view shows personal info section
Frontend: Detail view shows documents section with View/Download buttons
Frontend: Detail view shows payment info section
Frontend: Quick action buttons present (En examen, Accepter, Refuser, Demander modification)
Frontend: 'Demander modification' opens modal with reason textarea
Frontend: Modify modal has 'Annuler' and 'Envoyer la demande' buttons
Frontend: Submitting modify request updates status to 'À modifier' (orange badge)
Frontend: Messaging component shows existing messages
Frontend: Can send new message to candidate
Frontend: Sent message appears in message list
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API for modify status accepts optional 'reason' query param
Backend stores modifyReason and modifyRequestedAt in application document
Frontend AdminCMS.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Modify modal requires reason input before submit button is enabled
Status badges use correct colors: orange for 'À modifier'
Messaging component stores messages in adminMessages array on application
seed_data_creation: Test messages prefixed with TEST_ sent to existing applications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Applications redesign tested. Features working: 1) Applications list with search/filter by status, 2) Detail view shows personal info, documents, payment info, 3) Quick action buttons for status changes, 4) 'Demander modification' opens modal requiring reason, 5) Messaging component to send messages to candidates. The 'À modifier' status shows orange badge with warning icon. Backend APIs: PUT /api/admin/applications/{id}/status?status=modify&reason=..., POST /api/admin/applications/{id}/message, GET /api/admin/applications/{id}/messages.

applications_list.search: Search by name, email, program title
applications_list.status_filters: En attente, En examen, Acceptées, Refusées, À modifier
applications_list.cards: Show applicant avatar, name, program, email, nationality, date, doc count

application_detail.personal_info: Name, email, phone, address, nationality, sex, passport, DOB
application_detail.documents: List with View/Download buttons, document preview
application_detail.quick_actions: En examen, Accepter, Refuser, Demander modification buttons

modify_status.modal: Opens with orange header and warning icon
modify_status.validation: Submit button disabled until reason entered
modify_status.result: Status changes to 'À modifier' with orange badge

messaging.display: Shows existing messages with admin name and timestamp
messaging.storage: Messages stored in adminMessages array on application
